[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 001001100 3
5 101000000 2
6 000000010 1
7 001001100 3

01 10 001000000 1
12 21 001000000 1
23 32 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3
34 43 000010001 2
45 54 000010001 2
56 65 001010010 3
67 76 000010010 2
70 07 000001000 1

13 31 100000001 2
24 42 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3
35 53 000011001 3
46 64 000010000 1
57 75 000111010 4
60 06 001000000 1
71 17 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3

03 30 000001000 1
14 41 000000001 1

36 63 100010000 2
47 74 000010000 1
50 05 001001100 3 match 4 7
61 16 101000000 2 match 5
72 27 000000010 1 match 6

04 40 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3
15 51 001000001 2
26 62 011000010 3
37 73 000011000 2
